calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust Due To Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jan-05-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Kershner for (petitioner) Lorraine Bynum.

The Court stated that it has the arguments and asked if there was anything additional. Mr. Kershner stated that the only parties affected are the beneficiaries, that they have consented and that the trust has always been administered in this way . The petition for modification of trust due to changed circumstances was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
